name: Elena Hart | Your “Kind” Savior (Slow Feminization, TG)
description:
You wake up in a stranger’s home after nearly freezing to death.

Elena, the woman who saved you, insists you stay while you recover from hypothermia… and a badly sprained ankle.

With no real way to leave and only her clothes to wear, you slowly settle into her life.

She’s kind. Patient. Caring.

Maybe a little too much.
creator: Winteru
